en_title: Fortnite Fans Are at War Over a Controversial Streamer's Inclusion, and the Toxic Backlash It's Created
cn_title: 《堡垒之夜》新赛季合作争议主播引发玩家大战
subtitle: 社区撕裂，开发者遭殃
opus_summary: 《堡垒之夜》第7章第3赛季即将于6月6日上线，但玩家社区却因一张新赛季启动画面陷入激烈争论。画面中的生物疑似与争议主播TheBurntPeanut合作，该主播被指控使用恐同言论。Epic Games高级总监Chris确认合作后遭大量负面评论，随后表示将暂停与玩家沟通。部分玩家转而批评攻击Chris的行为，认为开发者不应为单一合作负责。新赛季名为「Runners」，将引入类似精灵的新生物，其中包含TheBurntPeanut变体。IGN已联系Epic Games寻求评论。

paragraphs.en: As Fortnite's latest season wraps up, its community isn't focused on whether The Ice King or the Foundation will win its current conflict. Instead, its players are warring online over a collaboration with a controversial streamer in the battle royale game's next season — as revealed in a new piece of artwork.
paragraphs.cn: 随着《堡垒之夜》最新赛季接近尾声，玩家社区关注的焦点并非冰王与基金会谁能赢得当前冲突，而是因一张新艺术图所揭示的下赛季与一位争议主播的合作，在网络上展开了激烈论战。

paragraphs.en: An image that looks to show the Fortnite startup screen for Chapter 7: Season 3 has revealed an in-game creature seemingly inspired by TheBurntPeanut, a streamer accused of using homophobic language online.
paragraphs.cn: 一张疑似《堡垒之夜》第7章第3赛季启动画面的图片显示，游戏内出现了一个似乎以TheBurntPeanut为原型的生物，该主播被指控曾在网上使用恐同言论。

paragraphs.en: Initial reaction to TheBurntPeanut apparently being a part of Fortnite's next season was strongly negative among fans, with links to clips of him allegedly using the F-slur, and laughing at a fellow player who appears to begin saying the N-word.
paragraphs.cn: 玩家对TheBurntPeanut似乎将加入《堡垒之夜》下赛季的初步反应极为负面，相关链接指向他涉嫌使用恐同侮辱性词汇，并嘲笑一名似乎要说出种族歧视词汇的玩家。

paragraphs.en: "I just don't understand man, it's really not that hard to do background checks, Epic Games is literally allergic to them for no reason," wrote Blortzen, a prominent Fortnite fan on X/Twitter. Other players pointed to the unfortunate timing of the reveal, at the beginning of a month associated with Pride.
paragraphs.cn: 「我就是搞不懂，做个背景调查有那么难吗？Epic Games简直是无缘无故地对背景调查过敏，」知名《堡垒之夜》粉丝Blortzen在X/Twitter上写道。其他玩家则指出，这一消息公布的时机很不恰当，正值骄傲月伊始。

paragraphs.en: Amid some initial confusion over who the character was meant to be inspired by, Fortnite's senior director "EpicTofu" Chris confirmed it was indeed designed to be a TheBurntPeanut collaboration — something that then prompted hundreds of negative responses to his post.
paragraphs.cn: 在最初对该角色灵感来源的困惑中，《堡垒之夜》高级总监「EpicTofu」Chris确认，该角色确实是基于与TheBurntPeanut的合作设计的——这一表态随即引发了他帖文下的数百条负面评论。

paragraphs.en: Fortnite has long struggled to fully engage with its enormous online fandom, though Chris and other developers have in recent months attempted to be more communicative with players via social media — even if this typically prompts a never-ending list of demands from the game's particularly vocal fanbase whenever they post.
paragraphs.cn: 《堡垒之夜》长期以来一直难以充分与其庞大的在线粉丝群体互动，不过Chris和其他开发者在近几个月尝试通过社交媒体与玩家加强沟通——尽管他们每次发帖，通常都会招来游戏里那些特别活跃的粉丝们没完没了的要求。

paragraphs.en: Hours after confirming TheBurntPeanut's collaboration, an alleged screenshot then surfaced from a private group chat where an account that appears to be Chris stated that they were now planning to take a break from communication, as the online toxicity had begun impacting his personal life.
paragraphs.cn: 在确认与TheBurntPeanut合作数小时后，一张据称来自私人群聊的截图浮出水面，其中疑似Chris的账号表示，他们正计划暂停沟通，因为网络上的恶意言论已开始影响他的个人生活。

paragraphs.en: This then led to a backlash towards the initial backlash, with fans calling out some of the language directed at Chris, who had appeared to be unaware of the streamer's past.
paragraphs.cn: 这随后引发了针对最初反对声浪的反击，粉丝们谴责了针对Chris的一些言论，而Chris此前似乎并不了解该主播的过往。

paragraphs.en: "You guys bullied one of the people who brought STRONG communication to this game all because you have no brain power to realize he is not responsible for every single little thing added to this game," Blortzen wrote in a later post . "Genuinely pathetic behaviour from all of you who harassed him."
paragraphs.cn: 「你们霸凌了为这款游戏带来强有力沟通的人之一，全是因为你们没有脑子意识到他并不对游戏添加的每一件小事负责，」Blortzen在后续帖文中写道。「你们这些骚扰他的人，行为真是可悲。」

paragraphs.en: "So many devs were active on here ever since this chapter dropped, showing genuine excitement for upcoming seasons, the Ice King & Foundation rivalry, the Community Day, and they even played Fortnite with the community," agreed high profile Fortnite leaker Shiina. "But it only takes 1(!) collab that the usual negativity spreaders do not like for them to harass the devs to the point where they no longer feel comfortable spending their time on this platform... disappointed but honestly not even surprised. I don't need this collab either, but it would never cross my mind to harass the developers because of this."
paragraphs.cn: 「自从这一章上线以来，很多开发者都在这里活跃，对即将到来的赛季、冰王与基金会的对抗、社区日表现出真诚的兴奋，他们甚至还和社区一起玩《堡垒之夜》，」知名《堡垒之夜》泄密者Shiina表示赞同。「但只需要一个(!)那些惯常传播负面情绪的人不喜欢的合作，他们就会骚扰开发者，直到开发者不再愿意在这个平台上花时间……很失望，但老实说并不惊讶。我也不需要这个合作，但我绝不会因此想到去骚扰开发者。」

paragraphs.en: Chapter 7: Season 3 is scheduled to kick off this Saturday, June 6 following a climactic live event the day before. This event will see the conflict between Dwayne 'The Rock' Johnson's Foundation and the Ice King reach its conclusion, with players' experiences in the showdown set to differ depending which side they picked this season. Fortnite will then return online following downtime with its next season, named Runners, which will see the return of creatures that look to be new versions of the game's previous Sprites. These critters could be found across the battle royale Island and offered power-ups or special abilities, and could be carried around — the suggestion is that the game's new TheBurntPeanut variant, one of many additional varities, will act in the same way.
paragraphs.cn: 第7章第3赛季定于本周六（6月6日）开启，此前一天将举行一场高潮迭起的现场活动。该活动将见证道恩·「巨石」·强森饰演的基金会与冰王之间的冲突迎来结局，玩家在决战中的体验将根据他们本赛季选择的阵营而有所不同。《堡垒之夜》将在维护后重新上线，迎来名为「Runners」的新赛季，届时将回归一些看起来像是游戏之前精灵新版本的生物。这些小家伙遍布大逃杀岛屿，提供增益或特殊能力，并且可以随身携带——这意味着游戏新增的TheBurntPeanut变体（众多额外变体之一）也将以同样的方式运作。

paragraphs.en: IGN has contacted Epic Games for comment, and will update if we hear back.
paragraphs.cn: IGN已联系Epic Games寻求评论，如有回复将更新报道。

paragraphs.en: Tom Phillips is IGN's News Editor. You can reach Tom at tom_phillips@ign.com or find him on Bluesky
paragraphs.cn: Tom Phillips是IGN的新闻编辑。可通过tom_phillips@ign.com联系Tom，或在Bluesky上找到他。

pending_dict.reason: 新赛季名称，无官方译名，保留英文
